Task.Description: To set the Attention section not visible in all tabs

Condition.Expression: p0 != "TRUE" && p1 != "TRUE" && p2 != "TRUE" && p3 != "TRUE" && p4 != "TRUE" && p5 != "TRUE" && p6 != "TRUE" && p7 != "TRUE"

ObjMapping.FldVal: Please complete the Workplace Transformation Initiative section prior to saving the project record.
